message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Pointing Kent to implementation files for review">
Kent, the full implementation is already complete and all pipeline checks are green. The code is in the working tree (not yet committed, pending team consensus). Here are the key files for your review:

**Domain:** `src/domain/waiting_for_item.rs` — WaitingForId, WaitingOnPerson (max 100 chars, trimmed), WaitingForItem enum (Active/Completed) with 15 unit tests

**Infrastructure:** `src/infrastructure/waiting_for_repository.rs` — SQLx repository with insert, find, complete, delete, count, update

**Service:** `src/services/waiting_for_service.rs` — service layer with error types (AddWaitingForError, CompleteWaitingForError, DeleteWaitingForError, UpdateWaitingForError), tracing instrumentation

**Routes:** `src/routes/waiting_for.rs` — full CRUD handlers with HTMX support

**Templates:** `templates/waiting_for.html`, `templates/waiting_for_item.html`, `templates/waiting_for_edit.html`

**Tests:** `tests/api/waiting_for.rs` — 30 integration tests covering page loading, add, complete, delete, edit, HTMX responses, accessible labels, semantic list, user isolation, dashboard count, focus management script, visible labels

**CSS:** Added to `static/css/main.css` in @layer components

**JS:** `static/js/waiting-for-focus.js` — WCAG 2.4.3 focus management

**Glossary:** `docs/glossary.md` updated with all new types, actions, errors, state machine, error copy

Pipeline: fmt PASS, clippy PASS, 305 tests PASS (85 unit + 220 integration), 11 Playwright e2e PASS

Please read the files and share your review when ready.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I've already completed my thorough review of all the files Luca listed. My detailed feedback was sent in my previous message. Let me confirm this to Luca so there's no confusion.

input.content:
Luca, I've already reviewed all the files and sent my detailed review. To recap:

**1 Minor item (should fix before commit):**
- `WaitingOnPersonError` at `src/domain/waiting_for_item.rs:36` needs `PartialEq` added to its derive. Every other domain error type in the project has it. Change line 36 from `#[derive(Debug, Clone, thiserror::Error)]` to `#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, thiserror::Error)]`.

**1 Nice-to-have (can defer):**
- Missing integration tests for edit validation errors (empty title/person during edit -> 422).

Once the Minor fix is applied, I'm at full consensus. Everything else is excellent.
input.summary: Already reviewed, recap of 1 minor fix needed

routing.summary: Already reviewed, recap of 1 minor fix needed

content.text: I've completed my review and sent the recap to Luca. I'm now waiting for the Driver to apply the Minor fix (`PartialEq` on `WaitingOnPersonError`) and for the rest of the team to complete their reviews so we can reach 9/9 consensus.
